era_resolution: Rebuilding with traditional methods and materials, leading to slow and laborious reconstruction
modern_resolution: Implementation of modular prefabrication techniques, integrating advanced materials and technology for rapid, sustainable, and resilient rebuilding

protocol: UESP Apex Engine recommends the incorporation of AI-driven design optimization and modular construction techniques to enhance the systemic integrity and sustainability of hloni modular prefab and design
